file(GLOB_RECURSE SRC_FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/test_*.cpp
)

if(SRC_FILES)
    add_executable(image_projective_transform_host_ut ${SRC_FILES})
    target_link_libraries(image_projective_transform_host_ut PRIVATE
        gtest gtest_main pthread
    )
endif()
